label: Transparent Bat motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Bat transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated bat motif for a design-system catalog: one complete bat with wings spread in a cave-mouth silhouette posture, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A real bat with accurate mammal anatomy, charcoal membrane wings, umber-brown compact body fur, subtle dusk-blue reflected rim light along wing edges, visible wing finger structure, small ears, calm alert expression, crisp silhouette edges, and natural leathery wing texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both full wings, body, ears, feet, and wing tips without cropping; symmetric but organic wing pose suitable as a catalog motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves charcoal wing membranes, umber body, dusk-blue edge highlights, and fine fur/leather texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no cave background, no moon, no trees, no Halloween styling, no vampire, no cartoon, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Bat" / "Bat Wing", derived from the provided isolated bat motif. It is a night monitoring system inspired by cave mouths, bat wings, charcoal wing membranes, umber body fur, and dusk-blue rim light.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the bat motif image. The board must visibly respect the motif colors: charcoal wing, umber body, dusk blue, cave limestone mist, guano taupe, amber sonar, and cool moonlit neutrals.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Bat", motif story, palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for night monitoring, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Typography: English guidance for Inter or Geist-style product UI; Japanese guidance for Noto Sans JP, clear labels, numeric monitoring rhythm, compact dashboard hierarchy.
UI style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product system, precise grid, 8px radius, wing membrane panels, cave-mouth arches, sonar ring icons, thin wing-bone dividers, charcoal text, pale cave surface backgrounds, dusk-blue focus rings, umber active states, amber alert signals.
Sample product context: night monitoring system with cave entry sensors, acoustic activity, roost occupancy, humidity, temperature, flight counts, alerts, and field notes.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs. Include English and Japanese guidance clearly.
Constraints: no Halloween styling, no vampires, no cartoon bats, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no other animals.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Bat" / "Bat Wing". It must feel like the same night monitoring design system translated to dark mode, derived from the provided bat motif and light-mode board.
Reference use: Preserve the motif-derived palette roles, component language, wing membrane texture, cave-mouth arches, sonar-ring accents, compact dashboard rhythm, 8px radius, and Japanese/English typography guidance from the light board.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Bat", "Dark Mode", palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for night monitoring, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Visual details: deep cave black and slate backgrounds derived from charcoal wings, pale moon mist text, dusk-blue focus rings, umber-brown active states, amber sonar alert states, limestone muted cards, guano taupe borders, subtle bat-wing membrane grain, thin wing-bone dividers, cave-mouth navigation shapes, precise shadcn/tweakcn controls.
Sample product context: night monitoring system with cave entry sensors, acoustic activity, roost occupancy, humidity, temperature, flight counts, alerts, and field notes.
Text: short readable UI labels; include English and Japanese guidance clearly.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black, no Halloween styling, no vampires, no cartoon bats, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no other animals.
